category_sources: Official docs describe Marmot as an open-source data catalog; source_facts.description says it exposes metadata to AI agents.
display_name_sources: Official docs and GitHub README use the display name Marmot; source_facts.name is marmot.
docs_sources: Official site links to dedicated docs under marmotdata.io/docs with introduction, quick start, deploy, CLI, query language, MCP, plugins, and API reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/marmotdata/marmot, so repo is intentionally returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official docs mention data cataloging, metadata, search/discovery, AI tools, MCP, CLI, REST API, and plugins.
